source_pr.title: util/filesort: Make sorting async
source_pr.body:
Optimize the input phase in filesort.

Use auxiliary workers to make sorting in input phase async.

## Evaluation

### Environment Setup

* One machine with two 10-core Intel Xeon E5-2650 v3 processors, 64GB of DRAM.
* Each core has a private 32KB L1 cache and a private 256KB L2 cache, and all 10 cores on a single processor share a 24MB L3 cache.
* Hyper-threading disabled.

### Workload Setup

* 10 million rows, the key size and value size are both 8 bytes
* Buffer size is set to 500K
* Adjust the number of workers from 1 to 16

### Evaluation results

![image](https://cloud.githubusercontent.com/assets/4158637/23327955/54a2a970-fb51-11e6-9833-64b8d8e487f0.png)

Compared to a single worker, using 16 workers can gain up to **8.14X** speedup.
